# init(phoneNumber:)

**Initializer**

Initializes a handle instance with the given phone number.

## Declaration

```swift
init(phoneNumber: String)
```

## Parameters

- **phoneNumber**: The phone number of the destination. Don’t include `tel` or `sip` prefixes.
title: init(phoneNumber:)
